items.summary: In TaskDialog.tsx, fix the Select component so that no <Select.Item> has an empty string value prop. Replace any empty-string value option (used as a placeholder/default) with the correct Shadcn Select placeholder pattern: use the Select's placeholder prop or a disabled placeholder item with a non-empty sentinel value (e.g., 'none' or 'unassigned'), and update the form state and submission logic accordingly so that selecting the placeholder correctly maps to an empty/null value when submitting the task.
